easy.title: Build a Personal Note Taker with localStorage
easy.description: Create a single-page note-taking app that stores notes in localStorage. Each note should have a title and content. Users can add, view, and delete notes. The notes list must persist across page reloads.
easy.starterCode:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Build a Personal Note Taker with localStorage</title>
</head>
<body>
  
</body>
</html>

medium.title: Theme Switcher with User Preferences
medium.description: Build a theme switcher application that lets users customize appearance (light/dark/blue/contrast) and font size (small/medium/large). Save all preferences in localStorage. Apply saved preferences on page load. Add a reset button that restores defaults.
medium.starterCode:

</body>
</html>

hard.title: Multi-Tab Shopping Cart with Real-Time Sync
hard.description: Create a full e-commerce shopping cart that uses localStorage for persistence and synchronizes across multiple browser tabs in real-time using the storage event. The cart should include products, quantities, price calculations, and a checkout summary.
hard.starterCode:

<html lang="en">

</body>
</html>
